text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for lending me that<n>manga.
The story was simply wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You liked it!? Any parts in particular?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see now... I especially liked<n>the line, "It
is not enough to be loved.<n>You must love in
return."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When the heroine resolved to overcome<n>her
passive nature and fully accept her<n>own feelings...
That really touched me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wow... You've grown so much,<n>Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That moment she confessed her love has<n>such
brilliance... And you totally got it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's why I've decided to try the<n>same right
away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, cool, that's—huh? Try it? W-wait,<n>what are
you—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My dear Ryan... I love you! Truly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whuh?! Um, uh, wooow! Me?! Geez, you<n>scared
me for a second there!
